dialogue.utterance: How you doing, sir? I'm [Name] with the fire department. What seems to be the problem tonight?
Left shoulder? Okay. Do you have any chest pains?
All right, on the on the pain, if you rate it 1 to 10 with 10 being the worst, what would you say it would be?
An 8? Just a tightness? Have you got any kind of uh heart history?
Not you know of? What have you been doing today?
Okay. When was the last time you ate?
Okay. All right. Uh I'm going to get some vital signs, and uh I'm going to check your blood pressure. We'll see what that is.
All right. And you are you on any kind of medication for anything?
None. Okay. All right, how's your breathing?
Just congestion?
Uh-huh.
Okay. Um I'm going to Yeah, check I'm going to check your pulse.
All right.
Um, do you know this gentleman?
Hey, sir.
Uh, if you would, talk to your friend over there.
That's the problem now; you had too many.
All right.
What I want to do is I'm going to listen to your lungs and uh see how this sounds, okay?
Okay, take as deep a breath as you can.
All the way around?
Okay.
That's good.
All right.
We, uh, I got the rescue squad unit will be here in a few minutes, and what we're going to do is set you up for transport, take you to the hospital, okay?
Um, and I'm going to monitor your vital signs.
Uh, I want to take them again in about 5 minutes, see how they're doing right then, okay?
Uh, if anything changes, if this pain gets worse, I want you to let me know real quick, okay?
So about 5 minutes.
All right, that's—That's getting a little bit better?
Feel a little bit more comfortable?
Uh, how about your pulse?
Check that again.
Okay.
All right, only thing I'll do now is just monitor him till the rescue squad gets here because he's not on any kind of medication.
I don't have any kind to give him, so we'll just monitor his—
No, because uh he's not having any trouble breathing, and uh we would— Used to be, that's the first thing we did.
But uh—
All right.
Thanks, sir.
Well, my first thought was indigestion.
Uh, I don't think it's really a heart thing.
Uh, I don't know.
What you did a day before might have kind of strained something, you know, pulled something.
Uh, but I don't think it would be heart related.
Appreciate it.
